programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.307
programme.desc: FRankly is made up of vocalist and guitarist Jung Seung-Hwan, guitarist Na Hyung-chul, drummer Ato, and bassist Koo Dong-uk. Deeply inspired by the 2000s Brit pop and American alternative rock, their music encapsulates authentic retro sentiments. However, they also display their trademark, youthful energy in many other elements of their musical work, such as album covers and song descriptions, making everyone fall for their kaleidoscopic qualities.In this episode, FRankly performs “TR,” “Grow Up!,” “DD (Drunk Dreaming,” “Help me,” and their latest single “Novel.”

programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.308
programme.desc: BAND NAH is comprised of guitarist and vocalist Nah Sang-hyun, drummer Kang Hyun-woong, and bassist PAIIEK. This 88io debuted in 2015 with the EP, “Tingling,” and has released about 90 songs since then. Impressively enough, their music is as diverse as it is prolific. They have been evolving in unpredictable ways every time while maintaining their delightful spirit - no wonder why they are highly sought after for concerts and festivals.In this episode, BAND NAH performs “Shine,” which they released early this year, “Love Love Love,” Spotlight“ featured on the sound88ack of ”Yumi's Cells,“ ”88,“ and ”1+1“ to showcase the essence of their musicality.

programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.310
programme.desc: Tune in to I'm LIVE and join their beautiful jazzy conversation!Joining us on this week's episode of I'm LIVE is Isaac Hong X Sooyoung Chin!Isaac Hong made himself known to the public with his Yoo Jae-ha Music Contest-winning self-written song “Spring” in 2013. Since then, he has steadily built up his own musical world, marked by his trademark, mellow vocals and delicate sentiments. This time, he collaborated with renowned jazz pianist Sooyoung Chin to drop their project album, “Everland.” It is a mostly English-language album made through months of full collaboration, and the two describe it as “a record of their conversations over piano.” Using the common language of music, the two expanded their reach into each other's respective universes. In this episode, Isaac Hong X Sooyoung Chin performs their songs “(n)everland,” “a bird,” “pages,” and also Hong's own pieces “Rain” and “Stay.”

programme.title: Bloomberg Next Africa
programme.desc: A monthly deep dive into Africa's biggest stories through a Bloomberg lens. Global investors see the continent as one of the top areas for opportunity and growth, and some African nations are well-positioned to be global hubs for development. This show will discuss key steps taken to help deliver on Africa's quest of bridging the gap with global powers, and track capital flows and the direction of funds amid the underlying political, economic and social developments.

programme.title: Silver Rarities Set

programme.title: Silver Eagle Rarity
programme.desc: RCTV is offering a groundbreaking 2025 American Silver Eagle featuring the first ever Eagle privy mark, graded perfect MS70. This unique issue ties for the lowest mintage Silver eagle and marks the first time an Eagle has been seen on the obverse!

programme.title: Wounded Warrior Project: No Warrior is Left Behind

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer With Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits South Korea to explore how it became a cultural and tech superpower she trains with a Taekwondo black belt, learns kimchi secrets from a grandmaster and dives into pro gaming.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer With Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals why ancient Greece was the birthplace of so many big ideas she decodes the Parthenon's geometry, sails the Aegean with ancient tools and is swept up in a riotous festival.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer With Hannah Fry

programme.title: The Circuit With Emily Chang
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Alexis Ohanian at Athlos NYC, an annual women's track and field event. They discuss his athletics portfolio, venture career and what really happened when he left Reddit.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Snap CEO Evan Spiegel in Los Angeles for a conversation about his entrepreneurial journey, building Snap and his latest consumer hardware bet Spiegel is doubling down on smart glasses and going head to head with giants like Google.

programme.title: You Are My Destiny

programme.title: Janani
programme.desc: When children are young, parents care for them and give them all they need to live a good life. The circle of life, however, means that one day, it is the children's turn to care for their parents and give them a happy retired life. In the current moral fabric of society, rarely and not often it works out that way. It didn't happen that way with Savita too, as her children had no time to look after her. So she decided not to settle out and reinvent her life. She embarks on a journey to discover herself and to make her own identity as an individual. Janani tells an inspirational story of a mother who rose against all odds and became successful.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. programme.title: Janani
programme.desc: When children are young, parents care for them and give them all they need to live a good life. The circle of life, however, means that one day, it is the children's turn to care for their parents and give them a happy retired life. In the current moral fabric of society, rarely and not often it works out that way. It didn't happen that way with Savita too, as her children had no time to look after her. So she decided not to settle out and reinvent her life. She embarks on a journey to discover herself and to make her own identity as an individual. Janani tells an inspirational story of a mother who rose against all odds and became successful.

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Invention Story S02 EP 21
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 11
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Chefclub Kids

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: Designed to captivate the intelligent young minds from class 5 to 10, EPIC INDIA QUIZ CHALLENGE is a one-of-a-kind quiz competition where teams from schools across India will fight for the crown of having the highest ‘IQ' i.e. India Quotient. The show follows a unique, tailored for a nail-biting climax, format as it tests the contestants' India Quotient, their knowledge of the country- its culture, history, geography, current affairs, and more. Known for his quick wit and charm, popular Bollywood singer and actor Meiyang Chang hosts the show that celebrates India and its diversity.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Devlok With Devdatta Pattanaik
programme.desc: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik: A Show That Explores Indian Mythology In A Manner Never Attempted Before. Renowned Mythologist Devdutt Pattanaik Dips Into Subjects Through Lesser-Known Tales And Narratives, While Attempting To Explore And Interpret The Questions That Arise From The Treasure Trove That Is Indian Mythology. With An Easy And Unassuming Storytelling Style. Devdutt Pattanalk Demystifies Mythology In Easy-To-Understand, Everyday Language In This Unique Series That Brings Ancient Stories To Life In A Contemporary Context. Each Episode Takes Viewers On A Fantastic Voyage Through Myriad Characters, Events, Stories, Symbols, And Rituals That Form The Basis Of Identity For The People Of The Subcontinent.

programme.title: Fight To Survive
programme.desc: Hunters Adrian Knopps and Garrett Hagen venture into the remotest part of Alaska's Misty Fjord, hunting Moose and Bear. After a successful hunt Adrian finds himself trapped by a twenty foot tidal surge after Garrett fails to return with the skiff.

programme.title: Fight To Survive
programme.desc: A bass fishing trip goes horribly wrong when a bolt of lightning strikes their boat, leaving Seventeen-year-old Christian Neal burned and unconscious and his father Gabe blown into the water and paralyzed. It will take a miracle to save them.

programme.title: Fight To Survive
programme.desc: Best friends, Ed Cohen and Ken Henderson, set out for two days of Texas gulf fishing. Tragedy strikes and the two men are stranded adrift in hostile waters.

programme.title: Fight To Survive
programme.desc: After a successful hunt., Adrian Knopps' hunting partner disappears taking their bear out to the boat. Now Adrian finds himself stranded on a tidal flat surround by bears and wolf packs and with massive storm bearing down on him. How will he survive?

programme.title: Fight To Survive
programme.desc: Justin and Jeremy Harris' weekend descent into a remote Utah canyon becomes a survival nightmare when Justin severely breaks his leg. As night fast approaches and temperatures drop below freezing, how will these two brothers survive?

programme.title: Fight To Survive
programme.desc: In an isolated mountain river, Fisherman Dean Ririe becomes hopelessly trapped under a boulder in water up to his neck. In icy waters that should kill a man, Dean fights for his life miles from help.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Get ready, because the forecast says you're in for a blustery day, followed by some heavy rain, and a slight chance of a tornado. It may seem out of the ordinary, but that's just another day in paradise here on Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Stop me if you heard this one before? What's fast, windy, and can ruin your day in seconds? Of course, we're talking about the weather. And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: What's windy, wild, and wet all over? The weather, of course! And over the next half hour, we're bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera! From the hailstorms that destory windows to the breathtaking tornados, we've got it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Brace yourself, because unpredictable dust devils, mind blowing lightning displays, and glass shattering hail storms are all par for the course when Mother Nature puts us in our place here on Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: When bad weather strikes, most people head in doors, but we head right into the heart of it. And now you can too, experiencing every thunderbolt, every dust storm, and every flood, all from the comfort of your own home. Let's jump right in!

programme.title: Monster Ant Chews to the Bone!
programme.desc: A monster ant with a bite that could rival its name. Mark tests its jaws and explores its defense mechanisms in this up-close challenge.Why does parrot blood look so strange? Coyote analyzes its color, chemistry, and what secrets it may hold about avian evolution.

programme.title: 24Hr Snake Hunt – The Clock Is Ticking!
programme.desc: One full day, one big mission—find a rare snake. Coyote races the clock to locate and document an elusive species before time runs out.Flying bullet ants sound bad—and they are. Mark takes on this airborne nightmare in a high-flying, high-pain sting test.

programme.title: Stung by a Fireworm!
programme.desc: The fireworm burns without flame. Mark handles this stinging marine creature and ends up with a fiery rash to prove it.Ever wondered what a thousand mosquito bites look like? Coyote offers his arms as bait and explores how mosquitoes affect humans and ecosystems.

programme.title: Insane Urban Beehive Extraction – You Won't Believe This!
programme.desc: Urban beekeeping gets extreme as Coyote removes a huge hive from a populated area. Flying stings and swarming bees make it a wild ride.What does a snake bite look like in slow motion? Coyote captures the full strike in ultra-HD to showcase precision and danger.

programme.title: Not Again! – 10,000 Bees vs. Face
programme.desc: 10,000 bees on one face?! Coyote goes viral again in this nerve-wracking attempt to see if he can stay still long enough to survive.

programme.title: Bitten by a Tarantula!
programme.desc: Mark gets up close with a giant tarantula. Though terrifying to many, he demonstrates how docile and misunderstood these spiders truly are.Ants attack! Coyote puts his feet directly into a swarm of biting ants and records just how painful and rapid their assault can be.

programme.title: Squirting Clams Pulled Up from the Muck!
programme.desc: Clams that squirt? Mark explores tidal flats where strange mollusks shoot water as a defense mechanism. It's weirder than you think.Bloodworms have teeth and aren't afraid to use them. Mark gets bitten and reveals why these creepy crawlers are misunderstood.

programme.title: HUNGRY LIKE A WOLF
programme.desc: Watch as Coyote and his team feed a deer to wolves in the wild. The episode captures predator instincts, teamwork, and the raw power of nature.

programme.title: New Species! World's Rarest Toad Found?
programme.desc: A rare toad species makes a surprise appearance. Mark reveals what makes it the world's rarest and where it was finally found.Deep in Ecuador, Mark finds a strange, oversized leaf insect. Its camouflage is astonishing, making it one of the best hidden creatures alive.

programme.title: Cactus Maze Runner!
programme.desc: Mark enters a twisting maze filled with cactus spines. One wrong move means pain, so he's got to think fast—and duck low.This spider might bite—but will it? Coyote examines the risk and anatomy of a feared species in this myth-busting episode.

programme.title: Face Off with a Giant Turtle!
programme.desc: Coyote faces off with a giant turtle in this land-vs-sea showdown. Jaws, strength, and attitude make it an unforgettable encounter.A fish crime in Texas? Coyote investigates a shocking environmental event where something—or someone—is disrupting an aquatic food chain.

programme.title: My Precious! – Coyote Goes Full Gollum!
programme.desc: Channeling his inner Gollum, Coyote becomes obsessed with a strange find in the wild. This lighthearted episode brings out his wildest side.

programme.title: Giant Fish Caught – Real River Monster!
programme.desc: A massive fish emerges from the river depths! Coyote wrestles this freshwater monster in one of the biggest catches of his career.The cicada killer wasp may look terrifying, but how dangerous is it really? Coyote gets stung to find out and compare it to others on his list.

programme.desc: Can Coyote and his team survive 24 hours on an abandoned island? With no supplies, the wilderness becomes both home and threat.

programme.title: Michael Bonacini's Christmas at the Farm
programme.desc: In this heartwarming holiday special, Chef Michael Bonacini invites us to his cozy farmhouse in Ontario for a charming Christmas feast. In this scenic winter retreat, Bonacini interprets classic Welsh and Italian Christmas dishes from his childhood. Michael cooks up comforting dishes from hearty potato leek soup, to succulent roast lamb, to classic molten chocolate lava cake. As he explores homey Christmas flavours, Michael shares his traditions and gives tips for perfecting the holiday meal.

programme.title: Watts Up for the Holidays
programme.desc: Spencer Watts serves up his take on traditional holiday fare, showing us that you can make an impressive dinner without the stress. In this cheerful one-hour special, charming bachelor Spencer takes you through all the planning tips and lets you in on his secrets to create the ultimate holiday meal.

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: The holidays are here! And the holidays come with a lineup of treats you won't be able to resist! From sweet and salty to traditional and unconventional, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: BIG WOW DESSERTS covers it all. To get in the holiday spirit, enchanting host Jessica McGovern introduces two desserts that could impress any Scrooge. First, Jessica bakes a decadent Chocolate Yule Log stuffed with a creamy Salted Caramel Frosting and finishes with a holiday-inspired cake decorated with homemade peppermint candy canes! Interwoven with tricks of the trade, Jessica guides us through her simple yet inspiring treats that are perfect for a big Christmas celebration.

programme.title: One World Kitchen: Our Favourite Holiday Recipes
programme.desc: In this special holiday episode of One World Kitchen, Hana (Japan), Vanessa (Italy), Natalia (Argentina), and Pailin (Thailand) get together to cook their favorite traditional holiday dishes influenced by their respective cultures. Christmas Sushi Rolls, Veal in a Creamy Tuna Sauce with Capers, Striped Bass in Garlic and Lime Marinade, and an epic Timballo. For the final recipe, our hosts combine all the flavors of One World Kitchen into a truly internationally-inspired turkey dish. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bonacini's Italian Christmas
programme.desc: BONACINI'S ITALIAN CHRISTMAS is a heartwarming one-hour holiday special featuring celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini as he shares some of his favourite Italian Christmas Eve dishes. Michael invites us to the set of his series "Bonacini's Italy" to cook up traditional Italian fare like Salt Cod Mousse on Polenta Crostini and Pork Braised in Milk. Michael takes us on a holiday culinary journey as he explores homey Christmas flavours and traditions, offering tips for perfecting dishes from the regions of Veneto, Sardinia, Calabria, Sicily, and Emilia Romagna.

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: Christmas is near, and the pressure is on! Between work, home, friends, and family, the list of people to buy for is endless. To help us through this busy time, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: EDIBLE GIFTS offers up four creative and more personal options to make the holidays cheaper, sweeter, and filled with love. Fun host Jessica McGovern shows us how to bake something for everyone including Crispy Brittle Bark covered in chocolate, rich Coal Cookies that are sweet with a bit of heat, adorable peanut butter-chocolate Reindeer Cupcakes, and easy-to-make Christmas Puzzle Cookies.

programme.title: Spencer's Big Holiday
programme.desc: No matter how you celebrate the holidays, let Spencer Watts help you plan the menu, in SPENCER'S BIG HOLIDAY! In this festive one-hour holiday special, Spencer Watts is serving up some of his favourite holiday meals, treats, and drinks. Follow Spencer as he shows us how to sail through the hectic holiday season with style, from brunch to the moment the clock strikes midnight.

programme.desc: Get ready for a special holiday BLITZ! with master mixologist Yvonne Langen as she prepares her favorite holiday cocktails and party snacks in the Gusto TV kitchen!
